mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, seckill_price, quantity, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_order (order_no, user_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, seckill_price, quantity, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{seckillPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_order SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
